title: Budding Resources
description: Budding Resources offers a way to generate resources from nothing but crystals. this mod is great for generation restricted modpacks such as skyblock!
body:
Budding Resources offers a way to generate resources from nothing but crystals. this mod is great for generation restricted modpacks such as skyblock!

![crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/447a0ce41e1e4c94121f93cee10c3d70718554d3_0.webp)
